name: Beef with Brown Rice and Feta Casserole
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 1
Freshly ground pepper
Put the dried mushrooms in 1/2 cup hot water and let stand for 20 minutes. Saute the onion in the oil slowly for 5 minutes, then add the tomatoes and garlic, and let cook gently uncovered about 10 minutes. Season to taste with freshly ground pepper, then add the dried mushrooms (quartered if large, with any tough stems removed) and the mushroom soaking liquid. Cook another 5 minutes.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Line the bottom of a 1 1/2 qt casserole dish with 1 cup of the rice. Add the cooked beef, and sprinkle over the top the feta cheese, olives, and half the sauce. Add the remaining rice and the rest of the sauce, and sprinkle with parmesan. Bake for 20 minutes.
